name: business-registry-scraper
description: Business Registry Scraper - Python FastAPI Backend

scripts.dev: lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; (sleep 2 && open http://localhost:8000) & cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python3.10 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
